effective 10/01/2018
discontinued 9/30.2019
748 I0020_PRMRY_MDCL_COND_CTGRY_CD I0020_PRMRY_MDCL_COND_CTGRY_CD I0020 Primary Medical Condition Category CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's primary medical condition category that best describes the primary reason for admission. effective 10/01/2018
749 J2000_PRIOR_SRGRY_IND J2000_PRIOR_SRGRY_IND J2000 Prior Surgry Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates whether the resident had major surgery during the 100 days prior to admission. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
8 = Unknown
